definition: The native HTML Sanitizer API (setHTML / Element.setHTMLUnsafe with a Sanitizer config) that parses and strips untrusted markup to a safe allowlist as a built-in, replacing hand-rolled sanitizers for XSS-safe HTML injection.
usage: Resolved native-first via the capabilityMatrix as the substrate for safe HTML insertion in renderers / rich content; a library sanitizer is the fallback.
